texto: Be militant in your own way! Those of you who can break windows, break them. Those of you who can still further attack the secret idol of property...do so. And my last word is to the Government: I incite this meeting to rebellion. Take me if you dare! (Emmeline Pankhurst, 1912)
explicacao: Citação de Fran Abrams sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Be militant in your own way! Those of you who can break windows, break them. Those of you who can…” articula sucesso, feminism, pankhurst em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como pankhurst e rebellion.
